reviews.review_title: Great game but I need help
reviews.review_description: So in the first day playing the game, I found like some maps I could enter but never entered them, but one day I thought, what if I played those maps, so I tried to get in the game and I didn’t enter, i got out the game, I could play it on the first time now why I cannot? Is this some sort of glitch or it just I don’t have that much storage?

I got to 10,000 clicks in the clicker game and unlocked the secret in one day but I want to play the actual game so can you release v2 so we can play then v3 instead of stopping people from playing the game entirely

Over all good game
I hope v3 will come out soon

I was just in a game and met a mod, the game is great a little laggy but fun. I’m thinking on promoting the game because of my status I could help the game greatly. I hope you guys make better updates better pls

This game offers a great experience, but I have concerns about the moderators. Their involvement can be intense; for instance, I just stated the game and got into a server one played eerie music that scared me and led to my ban. I'm still unable to play. Additionally, I've had trouble connecting to servers since downloading the game, and the limited options make it hard to join other players.
Every time I ran into somebody, the game would crash and I had to restart it ￼
This game is literally just a rip off of cube runners it steals like half of the features and my friend spawned outside the map like three times
This game is extremely fun! However, I decided to work for this game and became moderator and this just made the game a lot more better -outlaw

developer_response.body: The moderator that was abusing their rights has been blacklisted, and that was a one time incident if you could, please remove this review or change to better

reviews.review_description: This is a game that steals and copy’s assets from other fangames such as cube runners,monkeys place,capuchin,etc. with the forest map being directly stolen from another game. Please do not support this game or the creator.

developer_response.body: I never stole I made everything myself but yes I took inspiration from some other games and what game would make a map like that?
